hero.title: Fund the Future of
hero.description: Join thousands raising money for community projects, education, health, and infrastructure across Africa and beyond.

features.title: Why CrowdfundAfrica?
features.subtitle: Built for Africa, accessible to the world

mobile.title: Mobile Money
mobile.desc: M-Pesa, Orange Money, Wave & more African payment methods

blockchain.title: Blockchain Transparent
blockchain.desc: Optional on-chain donations for full transparency via Polygon

multilingual.title: 5 Languages
multilingual.desc: English, French, Spanish, Arabic & Wolof supported

currency.title: Multi-Currency
currency.desc: USD, EUR, CFA, NGN, KES and 15+ currencies with live rates

village.title: Fund Your Village Together
village.description: Users from the same village like Fadiouth can collaborate to raise funds for shared goals — infrastructure, schools, water wells, and more.

cta.title: Ready to Make a Difference?
cta.description: Join thousands of change-makers raising money for causes that matter across Africa and the world.

footer.tagline: Empowering communities across Africa and the world to fund the change they want to see.
